metrics.title: Completed jobs count
metrics.calculation: Count of jobs where status='completed'. Optionally filter by cleaning_type and/or time_slot.
edge_cases: Exclude test jobs. If job is voided/refunded and marked invalid, exclude via jobs.is_valid=false.

metrics.title: Completed jobs split counts
metrics.calculation: Return object with counts by cleaning_type for the window. Example: {basic:10, deep:10}. Goal evaluator compares each required key.
edge_cases: If cleaning_type missing, bucket as 'unknown' and do not count toward specific type requirements.

metrics.title: On-time jobs count
metrics.calculation: Count completed jobs where clock_in_time is between (scheduled_start - before_minutes) and (scheduled_start + after_minutes) AND distance(clock_in_gps, job_location) <= gps_radius_meters.
edge_cases: If scheduled_start missing, on_time=false. If clock_in missing, on_time=false. GPS distance uses haversine on lat/lng.

metrics.title: On-time rate percent
metrics.calculation: Compute 100 * (on_time_completed_jobs / eligible_completed_jobs) over the window. Eligible=jobs with required schedule and clock_in data.
edge_cases: If eligible_completed_jobs=0 return null and mark goal as not evaluable.

metrics.title: On-time streak
metrics.calculation: Max consecutive on-time completed jobs, ordered by completed_at descending, until first non-on-time job breaks streak.
edge_cases: Ignore incomplete jobs. If no completed jobs, streak=0.

metrics.title: Clock-in/out success count
metrics.calculation: Count jobs where both clock_in and clock_out exist AND both GPS points are within gps_radius_meters of job_location.
edge_cases: If either clock event missing or GPS invalid => not success. Use the same gps_radius_meters as on-time.

metrics.title: Clock-in/out missing count
metrics.calculation: Count completed jobs missing either clock_in or clock_out event.
edge_cases: If job is cancelled before start, exclude from this metric by jobs.status!='completed'.

metrics.title: Jobs with valid photo verification
metrics.calculation: Count jobs where there is >=1 before photo and >=1 after photo AND each photo timestamp is between clock_in_time and clock_out_time.
edge_cases: If clock_in/out missing, photo_valid=false. If timestamps missing, photo_valid=false. Photos may be customer-approved separately but validation here is timestamp + presence only.

metrics.title: Rescheduled jobs count
metrics.calculation: Count jobs with at least one schedule change initiated after acceptance (reschedule event).
edge_cases: Exclude platform-initiated reschedules due to system outages if flagged job_schedule_changes.system_initiated=true.

metrics.title: Cleaner-initiated cancellations count
metrics.calculation: Count jobs where cancellation_initiator='cleaner'. Includes cancellations after acceptance.
edge_cases: Exclude cancellations due to platform error if flagged. Include no-shows if modeled as cleaner cancellation.

metrics.title: Completed add-ons count
metrics.calculation: Count add-on line items where selected_by_customer=true AND completion_status='completed'. (Each add-on item counts as 1.)
edge_cases: If your product defines add-on completion at job-level, then count each add-on attached to the job when job_completed and addon_verified=true.

metrics.title: Meaningful messages sent to clients
metrics.calculation: Count outbound cleaner->client messages that satisfy meaningful criteria: template_id not null OR length>=min_chars OR client replies within reply_within_hours.
edge_cases: If message deleted, still counts if delivered. Reply detection: any client message thread within reply window.

metrics.title: Meaningful login days
metrics.calculation: Count distinct calendar days (cleaner local time) where session_start occurred AND within meaningful_action_window_minutes there is >=1 meaningful_action event (as defined in config).
edge_cases: If multiple sessions per day, count once. Use cleaner timezone; fallback to region timezone.

metrics.title: Meaningful login streak (days)
metrics.calculation: Compute consecutive meaningful login days up to today (or up to last meaningful day) by checking contiguous dates with meaningful_login=true.
edge_cases: Streak breaks on missing day. Use cleaner local time.

metrics.title: Job requests accepted count
metrics.calculation: Count job requests where decision='accepted' within window.
edge_cases: If request expires without decision, exclude. If accepted then later cancelled, still counts as accept unless explicitly reversed.

metrics.title: Acceptance rate percent
metrics.calculation: Compute 100 * accepts / (accepts + declines_non_good_faith). A decline is non-good-faith if not classified as good-faith OR classified good-faith but cleaner exceeded good_faith_limit_per_7_days at time of decline.
edge_cases: If denominator=0, return null. Good-faith classifier uses distance>=11mi, outside availability, job mismatch, safety concern (optional photo but note required), access/logistics mismatch, short notice <18h.

metrics.title: Repeat clients count
metrics.calculation: Count unique clients with >=min_completed_jobs_per_client completed jobs with the cleaner within the window (default min=2 unless overridden by goal filter).
edge_cases: Client identity is stable via client_id. Exclude refunded/invalid jobs.

metrics.title: Clients meeting minimum completed jobs
metrics.calculation: Count unique clients where completed_jobs_with_cleaner >= filters.min_completed_jobs_per_client.
edge_cases: Used for higher-level loyalty goals.

metrics.title: Max jobs with a single client
metrics.calculation: Compute the maximum number of completed jobs among all clients for this cleaner (lifetime).
edge_cases: If no clients, value=0.

metrics.title: Average star rating
metrics.calculation: Average of star ratings (1–5) over window for completed jobs. Cleaner UI uses stars; internal normalized percent = (avg/5)*100.
edge_cases: Exclude null/removed ratings. If no ratings in window, return null.

metrics.title: Five-star ratings count
metrics.calculation: Count ratings where stars=5 over window.
edge_cases: Only include ratings tied to completed jobs.

metrics.title: Disputes opened count
metrics.calculation: Count disputes opened for the cleaner's jobs over window.
edge_cases: Include disputes regardless of outcome. Exclude disputes that are later marked invalid by admin.

metrics.title: Lost disputes count
metrics.calculation: Count disputes with outcome='lost' for the cleaner over window.
edge_cases: If dispute pending, not counted as lost. If dispute reopened, outcome determined by final resolution.

metrics.title: Open or lost disputes count
metrics.calculation: Count disputes where status in ('open','lost') over window. Used for stricter maintenance rules.
edge_cases: Treat 'won' and 'dismissed' as not counted.

metrics.title: Lifetime lost dispute rate percent
metrics.calculation: Compute 100 * lifetime_lost_disputes / lifetime_completed_jobs. (Completed jobs excludes invalid/refunded.)
edge_cases: If lifetime_completed_jobs=0 return null. This is stricter than dispute-free windows.

metrics.title: Reliability percentile (lower is better)
metrics.calculation: Compute percentile rank of cleaner's reliability_score within active cleaner population for region (or platform-wide). 1 means top 1%.
edge_cases: Define population: cleaners active in last 30 days. If insufficient population in region, use platform-wide.

metrics.title: Composite: Review Whisperer
metrics.calculation: True if (template 'request_review' used >=15) AND (reviews_received_count >=5) within last 60 days.
edge_cases: Template IDs come from quick_templates. If messaging not available, badge disabled.

metrics.title: Composite: Tip Jar Energy
metrics.calculation: True if (template 'request_tip' used >=10) AND (tips_received_count >=3) within last 90 days.
edge_cases: If tips data not tracked, replace with proxy: customer 'tip acknowledged' events.

metrics.title: Tips received count
metrics.calculation: Count tips received by cleaner over window.
edge_cases: If tipping not implemented yet, stub metric returns 0 and composite badge stays false.
